display_text: Shadow Amulet, Cost: 900: A utility item that grants invisibility to you or an ally after a 1.25-second fade time, lasting 3.5 seconds with a 35% movement speed penalty. Excellent for initiating ganks, repositioning, or saving a low-health teammate. Stats: CD: 18s, Fade Time: 1.25s, Duration: 3.5s, Movement Penalty: 35%.
search_text: invis item, stealth item, fade item, gank tool, repositioning, escape tool, ally save, initiate invis, Shadow Amulet, amulet

display_text: Shadow Amulet, Cost: 900: Provides no direct stat bonuses. Its value is purely in its active ability. Stats: None.
search_text: Shadow Amulet stats, amulet no stats, utility only, no attributes, Shadow Amulet

display_text: Shadow Amulet, Cost: 900: Acts as a defensive tool in team fights by allowing key heroes to reposition or escape focus fire. Can be used offensively to set up ambushes or on an ally initiator to facilitate a surprise engagement. The fade time makes it predictable if used reactively.
search_text: team fight escape, reposition in fight, save ally, ambush setup, surprise initiation, defensive invis, Shadow Amulet

display_text: Shadow Amulet, Cost: 900: Core component for building Glimmer Cape, which improves its save potential. Situational on supports or initiators who lack innate escape or initiation tools, particularly in low-tier games. The 900 gold cost makes it an early commitment for its niche.
search_text: Shadow Amulet build, glimmer cape component, support item, initiator item, early utility, Shadow Amulet
